use_cases: Navigate long-form content pages with multiple sections
Provide scroll-based section highlighting for documentation sites
Enable quick jumping between page sections on article or blog pages
Display active section awareness on portfolio or landing pages
Serve as a persistent table of contents for scannable page structures
ai_summary: A scroll legend component that displays navigation items in a fixed sidebar and automatically highlights the active section based on scroll position. Users can click legend items to smoothly scroll to corresponding page sections. Features hover states and scroll-spy functionality for an intuitive navigation experience on content-heavy pages.
